title: Linköping Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Linköping with a Z-Score of -3.40. This event has a critical score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Linköping are characterized by a significant drop in temperature, with a heating degree day (HDD) value of 12.9 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 44% and the wind speed is moderate at 8.6 km/h. 
 The cold snap is expected to have a major impact on various sectors, including agriculture, logistics, and energy.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
